mnemonics.title: Seven Categories: FS-FPLCB
mnemonics.content: Remember 'Files Status - Files Programs Load Comms Background' for the seven categories: File management, Status information, File modification, Programming language support, Program Loading/execution, Communications, Background services (daemons).

mnemonics.title: Common Daemons: HASH-C
mnemonics.content: Remember 'HASH-C' for important UNIX daemons: H = httpd (web server), A = apache, S = sshd (secure shell), H = (syslogd for logging), C = cron (scheduled tasks).
